description_long: This is a modern L-shaped kitchen cabinetry set featuring a combination of tall pantry units, base cabinets, and wall-mounted cupboards. The cabinetry is finished in a matte white, with a continuous wood-textured countertop that wraps around the interior corner, providing ample workspace. Integrated appliances, such as an oven and cooktop, are seamlessly built into the cabinetry, while a large under-mount sink is positioned beneath a wide open pass-through. The cabinetry includes multiple drawers and doors, all with a minimalist, handle-less design for a sleek appearance. Open shelving is visible at one end, offering accessible storage for frequently used items. The overall design is clean, functional, and optimized for a contemporary urban kitchen environment.
description: A modern L-shaped kitchen cabinetry set in matte white with wood countertops, integrated appliances, and open shelving. Features handle-less doors and drawers for a sleek, minimalist look.
description_view_0: This view highlights the full L-shaped layout, showing the cooktop, oven, and extensive upper and lower cabinetry.
description_view_1: This angle emphasizes the open shelving, the under-mount sink, and the pass-through window above the countertop.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the solid back of the cabinetry, with the open shelving just visible at the far end.
description_view_3: This top-down view focuses on the sink area and the pass-through, revealing the continuous wood countertop and the open workspace.
attribute_cabinet_type: L-shaped kitchen suite with tall pantry, base cabinets, and wall cabinets
attribute_door_configuration: combination of double doors, single doors, drawers, and open shelf
